contentList.content: Warrior Abilities
You follow the Way of the Warrior, learning new ways to express your might.
Execute
Attempt to finish off a foe below [2] hit points, dealing an extra [1] damage.
Whirlwind
Unleashes a whirlwind of steel, striking all nearby enemies.
Charge
Charge to an enemy, damaging and possibly <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="RESTRAINED">Restraining</LSTag> them for [1] turn(s).
Double Time
After using <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Rush_Charge">Charge</LSTag>, you can use it once more with no class resource cost / cooldown. Expires on <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
You can use <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Rush_Charge">Charge</LSTag> once more with no class resource cost or cooldown. Expires on <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Sudden Death

When you kill an enemy using a Warrior Ability, your next <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Execute_Warrior">Execute</LSTag> is usable on any target regardless of <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag> and has no class resource cost / cooldown.
This can trigger once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.

Your next <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Execute_Warrior">Execute</LSTag> is usable on any target regardless of <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag> and has no class resource cost or cooldown. Expires on <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Thunder Clap

Blasts all nearby enemies, knocking them <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">Prone</LSTag> on a failed save, or else making them <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="OFF_BALANACED">Off Balanced</LSTag> on a successful one.
Storm Bolt
Hurl lightning at an enemy, possibly <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="STUNNED">Stunning</LSTag> them for 1 turn.
Anger Management
Whenever you land a <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> on a target using a Warrior Ability, refund its cooldown / class resource cost.
Does not apply when multiple targets are attacked at once.
Deep Wounds

When you hit a creature with <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_MortalStrike_Arms">Mortal Strike</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Execute_Warrior">Execute</LSTag>, or <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Bloodthirst">Bloodthirst</LSTag>, inflict <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLEEDING">Bleeding</LSTag> for [1] turns.
Tactician
<LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_Overpower_Arms">Overpower</LSTag> can be used an additional time per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Bladestorm

Become an unstoppable storm of destructive force. Until the end of your next turn, you are immune to movement-impairing and loss-of-control effects. You immediately <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_Whirlwind_Warrior">Whirlwind</LSTag> once, and can repeatedly cast it again by spending <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ActionPoint">Actions</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">Bonus Actions</LSTag> or <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ReactionActionPoint">Reactions</LSTag>. Bladestorm ends early if you take any other action.
Immune to movement-impairing and loss-of-control effects. Ends early after taking any action except <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_Whirlwind_Warrior">Whirlwind</LSTag>.
Avatar

Become an Avatar of Storm and Earth. For [1] turns you gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Bludeoning, Piercing, Slashing, Thunder, and Lightning damage, and you add your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag> to damage you deal of those types.

You are an Avatar of Storm and Earth. You gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Bludeoning, Piercing, Slashing, Thunder, and Lightning damage, and you add your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag> to damage you deal of those types.
